title: The Priest and the Girl
writer: Carlos Drummond de Andrade, Joaquim Pedro de Andrade
actors: Helena Ignez, Paulo José, Mário Lago
plot: In a small town in Minas Gerais, the arrival of a young priest causes a commotion in the conservative atmosphere of the place, aggravated by the sudden attraction this priest feels for a beautiful girl. This forbidden love affair ...
